inputs.label: Fair Market Value per Share
inputs.businessContext: Current market price per share at purchase date

businessContext_i18n.en: Current market price per share at purchase date
businessContext_i18n.tr: Satın alma tarihindeki güncel piyasa fiyatı (hisse başına)
businessContext_i18n.de: Aktueller Marktpreis pro Aktie zum Kaufdatum

inputs.label: ESPP Discount
inputs.businessContext: Discount percentage offered by the plan (e.g., 15 means 15% off FMV)

businessContext_i18n.en: Discount percentage offered by the plan (e.g., 15 means 15% off FMV)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Plan tarafından sunulan indirim yüzdesi (örneğin, 15, FMV'nin %15'i anlamına gelir)
businessContext_i18n.de: Rabattprozentsatz des Plans (z.B. 15 bedeutet 15% Rabatt auf den Marktwert)

inputs.label: Number of Shares Purchased
inputs.businessContext: Total number of shares bought through the ESPP

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of shares bought through the ESPP
businessContext_i18n.tr: ESPP aracılığıyla satın alınan toplam hisse sayısı
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der über das ESPP gekauften Aktien

inputs.label: Holding Period in Months
inputs.businessContext: Number of months held before selling; 0 for immediate sale

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of months held before selling; 0 for immediate sale
businessContext_i18n.tr: Satmadan önce elde tutulan ay sayısı; anında satış için 0
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Monate vor Verkauf; 0 für sofortigen Verkauf

inputs.label: Ordinary Income Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Applicable marginal tax rate for ordinary income

businessContext_i18n.en: Applicable marginal tax rate for ordinary income
businessContext_i18n.tr: Olağan gelir için geçerli marjinal vergi oranı

inputs.label: Long-Term Capital Gains Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Tax rate for long-term capital gains (if holding period > 12 months)

label_i18n.tr: Uzun Vadeli Sermaye Kazançları Vergi Oranı

businessContext_i18n.en: Tax rate for long-term capital gains (if holding period > 12 months)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Uzun vadeli sermaye kazançları için vergi oranı (tutma süresi > 12 ay ise)
businessContext_i18n.de: Steuersatz für langfristige Kapitalgewinne (bei Haltedauer > 12 Monate)
